raw_title: Sabine Mauderer: Navigating climate risks in Southern Africa - the role of central banks
raw_content: Speech by Dr Sabine Mauderer, First Deputy Governor of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the South African Reserve Bank (SARB)-Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) Research Conference "Navigating climate risks in Southern Africa", hosted by the SARB, Pretoria, 11 March 2026.
